title: astragalus ferruminatus
intro: Astragalus ferruminatus, also known as Iron-vetch or Iron-pod milk-vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China and the western United States. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus ferruminatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus ferruminatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
